CustomField.description: The lessee must pay the fee by this date, which will be recorded in the 'Date Payment Due' field on the invoice. The payment deadline is determined by the Fee Due Type, Due Day Setting, and Due Date Correction options configured in the Fee Schedule.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The lessee must pay the fee by this date, which will be recorded in the 'Date Payment Due' field on the invoice. The payment deadline is determined by the Fee Due Type, Due Day Setting, and Due Date Correction options configured in the Fee Schedule.
CustomField.label: Date Due
